시편 3:1.content: Yahweh, how my adversaries have increased! Many are those who rise up against me.

시편 3:2.content: Many there are who say of my soul, “There is no help for him in God.”

시편 3:3.content: But you, Yahweh, are a shield around me, my glory, and the one who lifts up my head.

시편 3:4.content: I cry to Yahweh with my voice, and he answers me out of his holy hill.

시편 3:5.content: I laid myself down and slept. I awakened; for Yahweh sustains me.

시편 3:6.content: I will not be afraid of tens of thousands of people who have set themselves against me on every side.

시편 3:7.content: Arise, Yahweh! Save me, my God! For you have struck all of my enemies on the cheek bone. You have broken the teeth of the wicked.

시편 3:8.content: Salvation belongs to Yahweh. May your blessing be on your people.
